best_bet.reason: The moderate south-to-north longshore current here is pushing shells and baitfish northward all morning, and with glassy southwest winds early before the south breeze picks up, you'll have the smoothest conditions for wading or paddling before the afternoon wind kicks in.

counties.name: New Hanover County
counties.beaches: Wrightsville Beach · Carolina Beach · Kure Beach
